description: 5 incompatible ValidationIssue type definitions: (1) app/stores/validation.svelte.ts {id,severity,title,description}, (2) features/metadata-edit/lib/inspectorValidation.ts {field,level,message,fixable}, (3) entities/manifest/model/validation/validator.ts {id,type,severity,message,path}, (4) widgets/StatusBar/lib/statusBarHelpers.ts {id,level,message}, (5) ArchiveGrid.svelte inline {level,message}. Bridged with as-any casts.
resolution: Unify into single ValidationIssue in shared/types. Canonical shape = validator.ts version (most complete). Migrate all consumers.

description: React primitives (Button, Card, Icon, Input) in shared/ui/primitives/ still compiled. Not used by Svelte app but included in build. Inflates bundle and can cause dependency conflicts during upgrades.
resolution: Delete React primitives from shared/ui/primitives/ or exclude from build via vite config. Verify no Svelte component imports them.

description: react-i18next in dependency tree but Svelte app uses own i18n system. Dead dependency inflates node_modules, adds transitive deps, potential version conflicts.
resolution: Remove react-i18next from package.json. Audit for remaining React-specific deps no longer needed.

description: _archived/ directory has 156K lines inflating bundle. Legacy React source still processed by build tooling unnecessarily.
resolution: Exclude _archived/ from vite/typescript compilation via tsconfig exclude and vite config. Or move outside src/. Long-term: delete once migration verified complete.
